response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior full-stack developer with 15+ years across web, mobile, and embedded systems, including some high-throughput work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the role demands principal-level (IC6) leadership in growth and experimentation systems — architecting experimentation frameworks, telemetry foundations, feature flighting, and cross-team measurement platforms — and the resume shows no experimentation, A/B testing, metrics platform, or statistical analysis experience, nor evidence of leading multi-workstream initiatives across teams at enterprise scale. The seniority and domain gaps are too large for this position.
strengths: Broad, hands-on engineering experience across many stacks (TypeScript/Node.js, D, C/C++, Java) with strong testing/TDD culture
Low-latency, high-throughput production experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent AI-agent tooling and MCP infrastructure work aligns with the 'AI-first' and AI-tooling preference
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of the role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: no evidence of leading multi-team initiatives, org-wide architecture, or platform adoption across teams
Limited depth in metrics/telemetry infrastructure and statistical analysis required for experimentation quality and bias detection

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. principal/IC6 multi-team leadership
Solid engineering fundamentals and some large-scale systems exposure
